name: SUNKEN LONGSHIP
description: An ancient longship from over a thousand years ago. Aboard the ship remains an undead crew of 40 3+1HD Wights led by Jarl Volgar the Dead King. He carries with him the Magic Rune Sword of Glory, which may be used to summon his crew at the cost of 1 life level. However, the sword only answers to Jarl Volgar, and all others will soon be consumed by his Ego.

name: SECRET TESTING FACILITY
description: Created by the Istanelli Government to test weapons of war. Over 150 Citizens, and Prisoners lie within this mountain facility. They face all manner of inhuman atrocities, all with the sole purpose of creating the perfect soldier. The mass populi knows nothing of this.

name: CITTÀ IN RIVA AL MARE ★★★ (ISTANELLI; POP. 5,825)
description: This port city acts as a tourist hot spot in Istanelli. Made so by it's scenic white limestone buildings, and crystal blue waters. The wealthy from all over Thernn vacation here, especially during the Festa Della Luce or Festival of Light. Occurring on the 36th day of the Month of Radiant, folks who stay for the festivities will be able to see the Shimmer. This is when the Ocean glows an otherworldy blue, and can be heard emitting a strange singing sound. The local pagans claim this is the Sea Goddess Waya singing for her peoples.

name: PARIA DEL LAGO ★★ (ISTANELLI; POP. 2,034)
description: Also known as Lake Pariah by outsiders, Paria del Lago is a village situated on a small man made island in the middle of a great lake. It is known for it's vast wealth, mostly due to it being one of three Magicore refineries in all of Istanelli. It is also one of six places in all of Thernn that can produce Grade S+ Magicore Cells. The City is extremely isolated from the main land, and holds a special deal with the Istanelli government to keep it that way. It is only be admittance by the Baron of Paria del Lago that any may cross the glass bridge into the city.

name: AMSTUTZ FARMS
description: This small farmstead is run by the 56 members of the Amstutz Family. They specialize in wheat, and barley. For some reason there have always been 56 Amstutz Family members… Never more, never less…

name: CITTÀ DI FIAMMA ★★★★★★ (CAPITAL OF ISTANELLI; POP. 423,000)
description:
This is the Capital City of the nation of Istanelli, and home to the Pope of the Church of the Radiant Light, leader of the Pontifi Lumini (See the City of Listuinia). This city used to be the seat of the great Fiamma Empire over 2 thousand years ago, however the Fiamma fell during the horrid first Daemon Wars. This is also home to King Montanari, Dictator over all of Istanelli. This city also functions as a Major port, however incoming trade with Istanelli has been halted by Montanari. The nation will only allow exports. In response Listuinia has put an 80% tariff on all Istanelli goods. 

(See Radioactive Twogaloo for guilds in the city)

name: GRÜNSTADT ★ (VULDENHOLD; POP. 245)
description: This small village is built into the side of ancient ruins built by the Lost People during the Ever Mourn. Legend tells that those dark tunnels lead to the tomb of Ash'Kazorm, the Daemon King of the West. The villagers living in Grünstadt use the legend of Ash'Kazorm to attract tourists and sell merchandise. The Explorers Guild has abandoned efforts to open the massive iron door supposedly blocking the lower levels of the dungeon. They claim it is merely a trick, and there is nothing behind it.

name: ISOLA DI BELLEZZA (ISTANELLI; CITTÀ DI BELLEZZA ★★; POP. 1,500)
description: This Island city was built originally as a Military fort, and is renowned for their ★★★★★ Monster Hunting Guild. The Island's coastlines are know for being extremely treacherous, and are filled with all manner of Mermusas, Undines, and Strange Sea Creatures. The City is also home to Istanelli's premiere shipyard, where the height of battleship technology is produced in the country.

name: ENDLESS LABYRINTH OF THE MAD GOD
description: This ancient dungeon was built thousands of years ago by Mobiüs cultists trying to create an offering to their Chaos Lord. Whenever Characters enter this dungeon it re-figures itself randomly. Use the Solo-Dungeon Generator from Radioactive Boogaloo I, or Referees may implant their own custom dungeons that will remain only when the same Characters/Referees run them. This is a great way to implement Solo-Play into your game. There will always be a portal to Firnum somewhere on Level 1.

name: PORT VULDEN ★★★★★★ (VULDENHOLD; POP. 1.2 MIL)
description: The Capital city of Vuldenhold, yet not it's largest. Port Vulden has been standing as the core sea trade hub for the nation for over a thousand years. This city has a pretty bad reputation for crime however, and is mainly controlled by a series of 13 crime families all warring with each other. Even Lord Vulden, the ruler of Vuldenhold and the city, himself is said to be in the pockets of the crime families. The city is also home to the largest industrial district in Esteria, with billowing factories running constantly to keep with the demand of this modern era. Port Vulden's sewer system is said to contain a civilization of mutant filth dwellers called The Forgotten.

name: CANOPY CITY ★★★★★★ (VULDENHOLD; POP. 5.3 MIL)
description:
The largest city in all of Thernn, with a strict separation from all nations. Canopy City was established as a neutral meeting place for all peoples. Built into the core of the now burned World Tree, Canopy City is said to contain anything and everything under the sun. Need a custom Mech? Canopy City. Need a Magically Infused Item Identified? Canopy City. Need a massive arena for a tournament? You guessed it, Canopy City.

Verticality. Most of the city is built with verticality in mind. With each district of the city separated into rings atop each other, with branching highways spread between them. The city has 13 distinct districts with the poorest living at the base of the tree, and the richest at the top. The Grand Arena is suspended in the very center of the World Tree, and hosts weekly events, fights, and shows. Occasionally the space will be rented out to host massive fairs. The Grand Arena is also the home of the annual Great Guild Games of the Explorers Guild (see the City of Listuinia). The games draw in millions of Lysts in revenue for the city, and in turn the Explorers Guild itself.

The Burning of the World Tree. In 1888 the world was thrust into fear when the World Tree was set ablaze, and the Emperor of Esteria assassinated. Was it the Shepards of Glastland? The Brotherhood of Life Eternal? The Shadowman? The Wisterans? That question remains unanswered. This event is noted as the spark that soon led into the current world war. Millions wept as the world’s main symbol of peace was burned. Though still massive, the World Tree is now missing most of it’s former glory. It still stands at a height of 2 miles tall, however it will no longer grow larger after the burning.

Canopy Guards. The most elite of the elite, the Canopy Guards might as well be superheroes. With the use of their Vertical Mobility Units or V.M.U. for short, they effortlessly move around the city. This is where their famous “Under 5” catch phrase comes from, meaning they claim to be able to reach anywhere in the city in under 5 minutes. Most of them carry twin sabers and their standard issue six-shooter pistol. The Canopy Guard sports a force of 30,000 strong, and can be mobilized into a small army if needed to defend the city from outside invaders. In addition to their V.M.U.s the Canopy Guard also has access to the most agile Mechs in all of Thernn, able to keep up with the foot troops.

name: SUNKEN CITY OF THE LOST PEOPLE
description: This massive underwater city is all that remains of an ancient nation once ruled by the Lost People of Thernn. Legend has it this place was maintained by the Shadowman before his fall from grace. The surface of the Sunken City is dotted with old temples, statues, and coral. The Undercity is a different story, filled with all manner of magical machines, soul transponders, and the crown jewel… one of the 13 Orbs of Power once used by the Shadowman during the destruction of the Old World.

name: PANTANO ★★★ (PARRINIA; POP. 13,055)
description: This city sits at the edge of a large swamp, south of Ciudad del Viento (3042). Pantano is mainly an industrial city in charge of lumber, and iron refining. There is a tense relationship between the Mayor of Pantano and the swamp folk to the North West.

name: DESTINO DEL PUERTO ★★★ (PARRINIA; POP. 11,025)
description: One of the major exporters of Shellfish, and Crab to the rest of Parrinia, Destino del Puerto is known for hosting the best fishermen in all of Esteria. Each year on the 14th of Mordus, a massive fishing competition is held here. Fishermen from all over Thernn compete to see who can claim the grand Destino Trophy. This pairs well with the local legend of an ancient sea monster living in the harbor. Some fishermen will neglect the trophy, there eyes set on the glory of catching the great Destino Beast.

name: MAZMORRA ★★★ (PARRINIA; POP. 6,500)
description: This town is built around the Mazmorra de la Diablo, or the Devil's Dungeon. This 10 level Mega-Dungeon ends in a direct portal to the Realm of Hel. Legend says it was built by Moloch himself during the First Daemon Wars, and was where he centered his campaign of destruction over Thernn. The town was built by adventurers attract to the prospects of ancient secrets, and treasure.

name: LOST SUBMARINE
description: Here sits the sunken remains of a Ludwargian Submarine. It was experimenting with an unstable engine running on Delirium Magicore. Whats left of the crew have all turned into strange mutated monsters, led by the Former Captain Shultz. Shultz himself has now mutated into something that resembles a Radioactive Dragon more than a man. There are a total of 65 mutated crew members not including the Captain.

name: PARRINIAN ORCHARD
description: This massive 5 mile orchard is the only one in the world that grows the rose-gold Parrinian Apple. Parrinian Apples have long been the staple of Parrinian culture, and are said to be gifts from the gods. The national flag of Parrinia even sports one of them on it. The locals in the area say that an ancient god lies buried under the hills, and that his golden blood is what gives the apples their unique hue. They also say this is the reason that Gold Metal mined in Parrinian is always found with the same rose-gold hue.

name: CITY OF LISTUIN ★★★★★★ (CAPITAL OF LISTUINIA; POP. 3.44 MIL)
description:
The Jewel of Southern Listuinia, the Capital City is not only the seat of the Esterian Imperial Throne, but is also the height of mankind's innovation. Sitting just south of the geographical midpoint of the Listuinian coastline, the City of Listuin acts as a major harbor for the entire Esterian Empire. The main city rests on an inlet formed by the Elisabeth, Tirean, and Luntrail rivers. It ranks as the 2nd most populous city in the world, seconded only by the great Canopy City.

The city itself is extremely old. Older than the Esterian Empire, the Kingdom of Listuinia, and even Mankind itself. Rumored to have been built by the Lost People, the City of Listuin is sometimes called the City upon Cities. This is due to the rebuilding of the city over itself as it sinks into the marsh. The undercity is rumored to extend many levels deep, and contain subterranean denizens of various types.

The city is split into 5 boroughs. They are referred to by the populous as North List, South List, West Elisabeth, George Isle, and Jim Isle. With George and Jim Isle being separated from the rest by water, and the Luntrail Bridge.

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CITY
The Hall of Innovation. Also known as the Hall of Glass & Power, the Hall of Innovation is a massive institute and home of great inventors. Young students, and experienced scientists come here to show off their latest discoveries. It is a cutthroat industry, and most are left behind by the swiftness of progress.

The Explorers Guild. The most prestigious guild in all of Thernn, the Explorers Guild is more than just a group of old fuddy duddys discussing war stories. They are the elites of all things adventuring, special operations, and salvage. Their main function is to explore the remaining untouched regions of Thernn. However, they are also occasionally employed by the Esterian Empire to take on special missions that require extreme caution and skill. For example, rescue missions, retrieving lost artifacts from less than savory hands, and intelligence operations. Some of the guild has been swept up into the current Imperial Civil War, and the War on the Wisteran front. Due to this, some see the guild as going through it’s own civil war.

The Explorers Guild is split into 13 squadrons who compete each year to be hailed as the best. Throughout the year, each squadron is given stars, and those with the most stars at the end of the year are declared the winner. This is mainly for prestige, however the Squadrons take this extremely seriously. The largest chance to earn stars is at the Great Guild Games, held on the last day of the year in Canopy City. The games have never been the same since the World Tree’s burning in 1888, however they are still a once in a lifetime event to behold.

CATHEDRAL OF LIGHT. The seat of the Luxveran Luminists, the reformed worshipers of the Radiant Light. The great schism of 1739 was what split the churches of the Pontifi Lumini of Istanelli and the Luxveran Luminists of Listuinia into two distinct denominations. The Pontifi Lumini believes that the Pope of the Radiant Light has a direct connection to the holy Light, while the Luxveran Luminists believe that only a prophesied being known as the New Light can speak for the Radiant. This Cathedral was built shortly after the schism as a show of force by the Luxveran Luminists. It stands approximately 420’ long, and 160’ wide. It’s large towers reach up to almost 300’ high.

(See Radioactive Twogaloo for the cities guild information)

name: TOMB OF ZËK THE BLOODED
description: This 5 Level dungeon is the final resting place of the Hero, and Lich, Zëk the Blooded. Legend says he fought in the Second Daemon Wars, and helped defeat the Prince of Hate, Moloch. Together the great Heroes banished the fiend from this universe by destroying his Daemonic Amulet... However, the portents say this banishment may be short lived. Zëk himself, as the tale goes, sought the secrets to life in order to retrieve his lost love from the afterlife. This is where the story divides. Some say Zëk went down the path of evil and became a Lich. Others believe he sacrificed himself to save the world from total doom. I guess you would have to delve into this dark place to learn the truth for yourself...

name: BROTHERHOOD OF LIFE ETERNAL HIDEOUT
description: This is the meeting place of the secretive, and effective, slayers guild known as the Brotherhood of Life Eternal. This 4-Star guild has, and will always have, 13 members. Each of them, having discovered one of the secret paths of Immortality, now work as assassins for hire. Some say it is because they are bored, others believe they are after a new goal beyond life. The 13 members of the Brotherhood are all 100th level, and include the following members: Hikaru the Scarab Samurai, Persephone the Witch Queen, Lucious the Masked Mage, Kay the Child of Death, Xerkez the Beast of Zariil, Jorgoff the Hammer of Titans, Joseph the Spider King, Ulric the Vampire Lich, Senji the Butterfly Knight, Sorin the Angel of Doom, Lilith the Daemon Fed, Arkon the Rune Golem, and Edimere the Golden Hand. Their Hideout is built into rock face of a sheer cliff, and is complete with a 13 levels deep mega-complex they have built over thousands of years. They have been known to work for any clients, with some even becoming future targets.

name: EISENHAGEN ABBEY
description:
This secluded mountain Abbey is situated deep within the Whispering Mountain range. It is currently occupied by nuns of the Holy Radiant Light, however this was not always the case. Different religions over the past 8,000 years have occupied this Abbey. All the way from ancient pagan peoples, to strange star cults. The Nuns swear the land is sanctified by light now. All of the Nuns of Eisenhagen maintain a vow of silence, however they say you can hear strange singing late at night flowing down from the Abbey into the valley below.

Beneath the Abbey sits the small village of Eisenhagan. Eisenhagen is a simple ★ village with a very suspicious and distrusting populace. These mountain folk will be of little help to visitors, and in some cases will simply kick them out. These people are scared for a reason… For they know what comes at night…

name: MADAME MARY’S DESRICK
description: This mountain cabin is home to the ancient and powerful Witch Madame Mary the Mountain Hag. She is protected by all manor of strange creatures such as the Bammit, Flat, Behinders, and more. The is said to grant wishes to those willing to make the journey to her small abode. Careful not to get on her bad side however, she fights as a level 50 Magic-User.

name: STRANGE REMNANTS
description: The corpses of 15 Listuinian soldiers remain here, torn apart by some sort of strange beast. Their bodies are also scared with radiation burns. In the center of the devastation rests a 10' tall solid emerald door with blast marks underneath it. Unfortunately for the party, there is still a pack of 13 Radioactive Zombie Velociraptors hunting this area. The door and the raptors were sent here via a Casting of Black Hole back in Firnum, inside the Sel Mathia Dungeon on level 1.

name: PORTAL TO FIRNUM
description: Portal takes you to Decima on Square 003.019
